case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. JAMES ABILAR et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABILAR, JAMES $1,382.51 PRINCIPAL, $537.10 INTEREST, $275.07 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,194.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF FLINT C. ZIDE RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST EXCESS OF 10% & ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED MAY-23-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ABILAR, JAMES
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $275.07 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ABILAR, JAMES
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033B (1) & (2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ABILAR, JAMES DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-15-2008
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE
